heading: Appointment of chiropractors in the Medical Service Corps
label: 8079 Appointment of chiropractors in the Medical Service Corps
text: Chiropractors who are qualified under regulations prescribed by the Secretary of the Navy may be appointed as commissioned officers in the Medical Service Corps of the Navy.
